case_title: CARIDAD S. RIVERA VS. MAJID BARANCE

docket_entries.description: SUBPOENA DUCES TECUM ISSUED TO HAROLD JENNINGS -CUSTODIAN OF RECORDS, BUREAU OF AUTOMOTIVE REPAIR

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RIVERA, CARIDAD S. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BARANCE, MAJID DBA BARANCE AUTOMOTIVE COLLISION & REPAIR $2,841.34 PRINCIPAL, $53.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,894.34, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT BARANCE, MAJID DBA BARANCE AUTOMOTIVE COLLISION & REPAIR HEARING SET FOR FEB-26-2010 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

PROOF OF SERVICE OF SMALL CLAIMS SUBPOENA (ISSUED SEPT-24-09)FILED. DATE OF DELIVERY:SEPT-29-09. PROOF OF SERVICE ON SUBPOENA FILED W/O ORIGINAL SUBPOENA. FILED BY PLAINTIFF RIVERA, CARIDAD S. AS TO DEFENDANT BARANCE, MAJID DBA BARANCE AUTOMOTIVE COLLISION & REPAIR
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-02-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-02-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: SASHA CUMMINGS. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM SASHA CUMMINGS FILED BY RIVERA, CARIDAD S.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RIVERA, CARIDAD S. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BARANCE, MAJID DBA BARANCE AUTOMOTIVE COLLISION & REPAIR THE COURT FINDS THAT DEFENDANT BARANCE INC. TRIED TO REPAIR PLAINTIFF'S VEHICLE IN GOOD FAITH AND PERFORMED THE SERVICES SHOWN ON THE INVOICES. WHEN THESE MEASURES FAILED TO FIX THE PROBLEM, DEFENDANT OFFERED TO OBTAIN EXPERT DIAGNOSIS FROM THE DEALER AT ITS EXPENSE BUT PLAINTIFF DECLINED. * THE CORRECT DEFENDANT IS BARANCE INC. DBA BARANCE AUTOMOTIVE & COLLISION CTR. DEFENDANT MAJID BARANCE IS DISMISSED (WRONG DEFENDANT) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
COPYING FEES PAID BY PLAINTIFF RIVERA, CARIDAD S.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAY-03-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED
STIPULATION FOR HEARING IN FRONT OF JUDGE PRO TEM MICHELE MCGILL FILED BY RIVERA, CARIDAD S. BARANCE, MAJID DBA BARANCE AUTOMOTIVE COLLISION & REPAIR

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,841.34 FILED BY RIVERA, CARIDAD S. AS TO DEFENDANT BARANCE, MAJID DBA BARANCE AUTOMOTIVE COLLISION & REPAIR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-02-2009 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$0.00) SERVED SEP-25-2009, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BARANCE, MAJID DBA BARANCE AUTOMOTIVE COLLISION & REPAIR
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-02-2009 - JUDGMENT.

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY MAJID BARANCE IS GRANTED. CONTINUED TO FEB-26-2010 AT 3:30 PM IN 506 FOR TRIAL. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHELE MCGILL, CLERK: MARJORIE SCHWARTZ-SCOTT, NOT REPORTED (506) APPEARANCE BY BOTH SIDES. EXHIBITS RETAINED BY PLAINTIFF
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-26-2010 - JUDGMENT.
